_VerifiedCollectionSchema.description: Output schema used by legacy ToolExecutor.dispatch validation.
_VerifiedCollectionSchema.title: _VerifiedCollectionSchema

description: Input for PPS bid public information.

bid_ntce_nm.description: Official PPS bidNtceNm notice-name keyword. Partial names are allowed; use this for citizen keywords such as 전기공사.
bid_ntce_nm.title: Bid Ntce Nm

dminstt_nm.description: Official PPS dminsttNm demand agency name filter. Partial agency names are allowed.
dminstt_nm.title: Dminstt Nm

indstryty_nm.description: Official PPS indstrytyNm industry/license name. Use 전기공사업 for electrical-construction qualification searches when requested.
indstryty_nm.title: Indstryty Nm

inqry_bgn_dt.description: Official PPS inqryBgnDt search start datetime in YYYYMMDDHHMM. Required when inqry_div is '1' or '2'. Keep each PPS request window within 31 days.
inqry_bgn_dt.title: Inqry Bgn Dt

inqry_div.description: Official PPS inqryDiv. Use '1' for bid notice publication datetime (pblancDate) searches such as 'this week posted notices'; use '2' for bid opening datetime (opengDt) searches.
inqry_div.title: Inqry Div

inqry_end_dt.description: Official PPS inqryEndDt search end datetime in YYYYMMDDHHMM. Required when inqry_div is '1' or '2'. Keep each PPS request window within 31 days.
inqry_end_dt.title: Inqry End Dt

ntce_instt_nm.description: Official PPS ntceInsttNm public notice agency name filter. Partial agency names are allowed.
ntce_instt_nm.title: Ntce Instt Nm

prtcpt_lmt_rgn_nm.description: Official PPS prtcptLmtRgnNm participation-limit region name. For Busan-region notices use 부산광역시 when the citizen says 부산시.
prtcpt_lmt_rgn_nm.title: Prtcpt Lmt Rgn Nm

region_name.description: UMMAYA client-side region relevance filter copied from citizen wording. This is not sent to PPS upstream; after the official response, UMMAYA keeps rows whose documented region/agency fields such as cnstrtsiteRgnNm, prtcptLmtRgnNm, ntceInsttNm, or dminsttNm match this value.
region_name.title: Region Name

title: pps_bid_public_info
